english_text: Red shoes lead me to you
Through the night I wait for you
Love poem written just for you
Peach is sweet like your smile
Every end is a new beginning
A glass of soju with tears
The night letter I sent you
Every breath I take is for you
Walking in the rain with you
You and I under the same sky
A song that reminds me of you

romanization: eodum sok binnaneun bitThis melody stays with me
